title: Centaurium chloodes
taxonomy: Centaurium chloodes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its unique characteristics. The classification of Centaurium chloodes places it within the genus Centaurium, which contains several species of gentian-like plants. Centaurium chloodes is further classified as a perennial herbaceous plant, with distinct features that set it apart from other species in the genus. The detailed classification of Centaurium chloodes is a topic of ongoing study and research in the field of botany.
